tasks.label: Android: Start Emulator
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $sdk = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Android\Sdk'; $emulator = Join-Path $sdk 'emulator\emulator.exe'; $adb = Join-Path $sdk 'platform-tools\adb.exe'; if (-not (Test-Path $emulator)) { throw "Android emulator was not found at $emulator" }; if (-not (Test-Path $adb)) { throw "adb was not found at $adb" }; $devices = & $adb devices; if ($devices -match '^emulator-\d+\s+device$') { Write-Host 'An emulator is already running.'; exit 0 }; Start-Process -FilePath $emulator -ArgumentList '-avd', '${input:androidAvd}'; Write-Host "Starting emulator ${input:androidAvd}..."

tasks.label: Android: Wait For Emulator
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $sdk = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Android\Sdk'; $adb = Join-Path $sdk 'platform-tools\adb.exe'; if (-not (Test-Path $adb)) { throw "adb was not found at $adb" }; & $adb start-server | Out-Null; function Get-EmulatorSerial { $lines = & $adb devices; foreach ($line in $lines) { if ($line -match '^(emulator-\d+)\s+device$') { return $matches[1] } }; return $null }; $serial = $null; for ($i = 0; $i -lt 90; $i++) { $serial = Get-EmulatorSerial; if ($serial) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; if (-not $serial) { throw 'Timed out waiting for an emulator device.' }; for ($i = 0; $i -lt 120; $i++) { $boot = (& $adb -s $serial shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>$null).Trim(); if ($boot -eq '1') { Write-Host "Emulator ready: $serial"; exit 0 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; throw "Timed out waiting for $serial to finish booting."

tasks.label: Android: Install Debug APK
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $sdk = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Android\Sdk'; $adb = Join-Path $sdk 'platform-tools\adb.exe'; $apk = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'android\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk'; if (-not (Test-Path $adb)) { throw "adb was not found at $adb" }; if (-not (Test-Path $apk)) { throw "APK not found at $apk. Run the build task first." }; function Get-EmulatorSerial { $lines = & $adb devices; foreach ($line in $lines) { if ($line -match '^(emulator-\d+)\s+device$') { return $matches[1] } }; return $null }; $serial = Get-EmulatorSerial; if (-not $serial) { throw 'No running emulator device was found.' }; & $adb -s $serial install -r $apk; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'adb install failed.' }

tasks.label: Android: Launch App
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $sdk = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Android\Sdk'; $adb = Join-Path $sdk 'platform-tools\adb.exe'; if (-not (Test-Path $adb)) { throw "adb was not found at $adb" }; function Get-EmulatorSerial { $lines = & $adb devices; foreach ($line in $lines) { if ($line -match '^(emulator-\d+)\s+device$') { return $matches[1] } }; return $null }; $serial = Get-EmulatorSerial; if (-not $serial) { throw 'No running emulator device was found.' }; & $adb -s $serial shell am start -W -n 'com.qzone.android/.MainActivity'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw 'Failed to launch com.qzone.android/.MainActivity.' }

tasks.label: Android: Build And Run On Emulator
